differential_diagnoses: Severe insulin resistance syndrome (Type B insulin resistance)
next_steps: Test for anti-insulin receptor antibodies (Type B insulin resistance)
Evaluate for insulin injection technique and possibility of insulin non-adherence or surreptitious administration
Consult endocrinology for transition to subcutaneous U-500 insulin titration protocol or consideration of U-500 pump
Assess for systemic autoimmune disease (e.g., repeating ANA, checking ENA, C1q, CH50)
Perform clinical psychiatric evaluation for factitious disorder or severe psychological distress
Evaluate for systemic inflammatory or connective tissue disease given ANA positivity
Discontinue unnecessary medications and simplify the regimen to improve reliability
